security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Cambrian Web UI — operator console for the Cambrian agent OS.
bundle.longDescription: Mission-control for the Cambrian runtime. Chat with sessions, watch plans form, inspect the LTM, configure the runtime.
